title: Tampa D-28 client
description: Neck reset on the 1963 Martin D-28. Action is high at the 12th and climbing, saddle already shaved flat. Steam the dovetail, reset the angle, plane and refit the joint, then a full setup. Waiting on the hide glue restock before the reset.

title: Sarah Kim mandolin
description: Fret level and dress on the Sarah Kim F-5 mandolin. Buzzing on the A course above the 7th, two frets seated proud. Level, crown, and polish, then recut the nut slots and set intonation at the bridge.

title: Doug Pruitt Tele
description: Electronics rewire on the 1972 Fender Telecaster. Scratchy volume pot and a cold joint on the selector switch dropping the bridge pickup. Replace both pots, reflow the switch, shield the control cavity, and check the output jack.

title: Ramblers banjo
description: Setup and head tension on the Gibson RB-250 banjo. Head reading soft, tone gone dull, and the coordinator rods need a truing. Retension the head to spec, true the rods, and set the bridge. Owner is fine waiting until after the holidays.

title: Ortiz Martin
description: Neck reset and full restoration on the Ortiz family Martin 000-18 finished and ready. Reset held, action set to spec, new bone nut and saddle cut, frets dressed. Cleaned and strung, waiting on the client pickup notice to go out.

title: Vance Gibson LP
description: Refret on the 1959 Gibson Les Paul. Frets worn to the board through the first five, divots under the wound strings. Pull the old wire, level the board, refret with medium-jumbo, and set up. Vintage board so this one goes slow.

title: Coastal HS jazz band
description: Setup pass on the Coastal HS archtop for the school jazz band. Action high and the pickguard bracket loose. Reseat the bracket, set action and intonation, and restring. School needs it back before the winter concert.

title: Ferro archtop
description: Bridge and top crack repair on the Ferro L-5 copy. Hairline crack running off the treble f-hole and the bridge base no longer seated flat. Cleat and glue the crack, refit the bridge base to the arched top, then set it up.

title: Delgado 000-18
description: Nut replacement and setup on the Delgado 000-18. Original nut cracked at the low E slot and binding the strings. Cut a new bone nut, dress the slots, and set the action. Straightforward once the bench clears.

title: Hobbs J-45
description: Bridge reglue on the Hobbs Gibson J-45 finished and ready. Bridge had lifted at the rear edge under string tension; cleaned the joint, reglued and clamped, verified saddle height and intonation. Strung and cleaned, waiting on the pickup notice.
